name: report-project
prompt: Summarize the current ops-service project for a human operator. Read the latest project metadata, phase/state, and recent activity. Report service health, incident signature, linked issue/PR, current blocker or pending human decision, and the next action. If CRON_TELEGRAM_CONTEXT indicates a default paired chat, send the same summary with telegram_send. Treat Telegram as report-only; do not assume the reply itself is project approval.
